ValidationRule.description: Billing Account & Cost Center can not be changed after Child exist(ed)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR( ISCHANGED( BillingViaCompany__c ), ISCHANGED(ProjectCostCenter__c) ), OR( ValHasPackage__c=true, ValHasTime__c=true, ValHasExpense__c=true, ValHasSupplierCosts__c=true, ValHasInvoice__c=true ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Billing Account and/or Cost Center can not be changed anymore due to existing child objects (time, expense, supplier costs, Invoices). Please contact your Super User for assistance. (PR005)
